record.field: SELECT 1 FROM res_partner WHERE id = %s AND customer_industry_id IN (SELECT id FROM customer_industry WHERE name = 'Agriculture Sector')
Risk assessment for agriculture sector clients. Apply enhanced compliance monitoring for agriculture sector.
